# Support

## Getting Help

Thank you for using Legacy Concierge! Here are the best ways to get support:

### 🐛 Bug Reports

If you've found a bug, please
[create a new issue](https://github.com/dylarcher/legacy-concierge/issues/new/choose)
using the appropriate template.

### 💡 Feature Requests

Have an idea for a new feature? We'd love to hear it! Please
[create a feature request](https://github.com/dylarcher/legacy-concierge/issues/new/choose).

### 💬 Discussions

For questions, ideas, and general discussion:

- [GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/dylarcher/legacy-concierge/discussions)

### 🔒 Security Issues

Please report security vulnerabilities privately through:

- [GitHub Security Advisories](https://github.com/dylarcher/legacy-concierge/security/advisories/new)
- Email: <dylarcher@gmail.com>

### 📚 Documentation

- [Project README](../README.md)
- [Contributing Guidelines](CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [API Documentation](../docs/)

### 📧 Direct Contact

For urgent issues or private matters:

- Email: <dylarcher@gmail.com>

### 💝 Support the Project

If Legacy Concierge is helpful to you, consider:

- ⭐ Starring the repository
- 💖 [Sponsoring the project](https://github.com/sponsors/dylarcher)
- 🗣️ Spreading the word

## Response Times

- **Critical security issues**: Within 24 hours
- **Bug reports**: 2-5 business days
- **Feature requests**: 1-2 weeks
- **General questions**: 3-7 business days

Please note that this is an open-source project maintained by volunteers, and
response times may vary.
